meaning: adj.天使的,天真无邪的,可爱的
examples: The cherubic feather falls in my front.
Noe has a cherubic face and a dazzling smile.
Do you think of tiny cherubic angels, like the ones that dot Sunday school materials?
In my cherubic youth I used to wonder why so many venture capitalists opposed a reduced capital gains tax.
Bongeka scrunched up her cherubic face as she flipped through the clothing catalog, noting aloud that only one of the Brooks Brothers models was black.
